creator: a.andersson.thn@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 192112
Update to 0.10.0

Good evening. This updates carbon-relay-ng to version 0.10.0. https://github.com/graphite-ng/carbon-relay-ng/releases/tag/0.10.0

It has some new features:

* google pubsub
* amazon cloudwatch

And some fixes:

* fix overlapping spool names / stats / log entries when you use same endpoint tcp address multiple times.
* grafanaNet defaults update: timeout 5s->10s, flushMaxNum 10k->5k, concurrency 10->100

Regarding the port it self I removed distversion prefix since it wasn't used in this release.

Poudriere QA passes with 10.3, 10.4, 11.1 and 12-CURRENT. portlint -AC also fine.
